recentTweets.text: Proud to recognize our lineworkers and the work they do to keep our country powered and safe every day. https://t.co/KHPHQdYpFh

It was a powerful experience to gather with veterans and families to see The Moving Wall and honor the Vietnam soldiers who made the ultimate sacrifice. Welcome Home. https://t.co/FaajRHbAIM
We had a great time at the Honesdale Senior Center Picnic last week! Thank you to all of the staff and volunteers who made it another fantastic event for our community. https://t.co/43bkcGxko0

When individual states fail to enforce the rules for CDLs, citizens and law enforcement in every state pay the price. 

At a minimum, CDL drivers should be able to understand English, and I’ll continue fighting to make sure this becomes law. https://t.co/diG73SZ8KB

It’s always a good day when we’re bringing federal dollars back to Northeastern Pennsylvania. Proud to secure $2 million in federal funding for the SR 6 Bridge over Wallenpaupack Creek. I’ll always fight to deliver for NEPA. https://t.co/mDDvSPadMm
